summary: Pre-deployment regression sweep (iteration 12). Backend 24/24 pytest PASS — all listed public endpoints return 200 with valid payloads (/api/products, /api/portfolio, /api/categories, /api/page-content/weddings, /api/settings, /api/cards, /api/addons, /api/boxes, /api/workshops, /api/templates), all 10 service slugs reachable via /api/page-content/{slug}, admin login + wrong-password rejection work, /api/admin/portfolio gated, and PUT /api/admin/page-content/weddings round-trips 200. Frontend: all 16 public routes load 200 with header+footer rendered, no console errors on simple page loads, no 'London' / 'next-day' / 'tomorrow' copy anywhere; rebrand to 'Flower Atelier' + 'Leicester, Midlands' is consistent across home, footer, /privacy, /collection. Admin /admin: login OK, all 12 expected tabs present (orders, inquiries, products, cards, boxes, templates, addons, workshops, portfolio, pages, seo, settings) and clickable, all tab content renders (body_len 1192–3315), Service Pages tab shows 10 page-content-edit-* cards with 10 'Live' labels, Workshops has Programmes/Sessions/Bookings sub-tabs. CRITICAL bug found: opening the Send-this-bouquet modal on Product Detail Page (/product/{id}) triggers an infinite 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error (fired ~200+ times in one render burst) — modal still renders but the loop kills perf and floods the console; root cause is almost certainly SendFlow.js:80-93 useEffect with [open, product] deps where the `product` object reference from ProductDetailPage changes every render OR a child effect in step rendering setting state without a stable dep.

ui_bugs.issue: Infinite render loop — 'Maximum update depth exceeded' fires continuously while the Send-this-bouquet modal is open. Visible immediately after clicking [data-testid='send-flow-trigger'] on /product/{id}. Modal still appears but console floods with React error and the page becomes laggy.

integration_issues.issue: After successful admin login from /login, user is redirected to / (homepage) instead of /admin. Admin must manually navigate to /admin to access the dashboard. Not blocking (tabs all work once on /admin) but is poor UX for admin role.

issues: Hydration warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>.' Triggered inside a Tabs/Select inside one of the admin tabs. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up before deploy to avoid SSR/CSR mismatch warnings in production.

action_items: CRITICAL — Fix infinite render loop in /app/frontend/src/components/SendFlow.js. Suspect: useEffect at line 80-93 has deps [open, product]; if ProductDetailPage passes a freshly-constructed object on every render the effect re-runs, calls setStep(0)/setChosen* (which are no-ops once stable) BUT the actual loop is more likely from a child component setting state during render. Recommend: (a) memoize the product prop in ProductDetailPage with useMemo, (b) split the effect into two — one keyed on `open` only for reset, another keyed on `open && product?.id` for the trackEvent fire-once, and (c) audit the per-step subcomponents (DesignerOpen, addons grid, dates list) for setState-in-render patterns.
Admin login redirect: AuthContext or LoginPage onSubmit should detect admin role and push('/admin') instead of push('/').
Clean up <span> inside <option> hydration warning in one of the admin Tabs/Select components.

(Carry-over from iteration_11, still unfixed) TravellerFuneralsPage.js:49 hero subtitle fallback still renders hardcoded ' of the life.' when CMS hero_title_line2='' — explicit null check or seed line2 with text.
critical_code_review_comments: SendFlow.js infinite loop is the single deployment blocker. Until fixed, every user who opens the 'Send this bouquet' modal will silently hit a runaway React error — even though the modal renders, the perf hit on slower devices may freeze the page.

ProductDetailPage no longer surfaces an 'Add to cart' button on the PDP (only 'Send this bouquet' + WhatsApp + ENQUIRE). Home page and CollectionPage still show 'ADD TO BASKET' cards. Confirm with product owner this is intended.
Login redirect logic ignores admin role — admins land on homepage, not /admin. Worth fixing for production.
server.py still ~3121 lines — recurring recommendation to split into routers. Not blocking.
Hydration warning in ` inside an admin component and replace with a plain text label.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_12.py (new — 24 tests covering backend health, all 10 service-page slugs, admin auth, admin portfolio, weddings PUT round-trip)

success_rate.frontend: 94% — 15/16 public smoke checks pass; PDP send-flow modal fails on infinite-loop bug. Admin 12/12 tabs + 10/10 Live service-page cards + 3/3 workshop sub-tabs OK.

seed_data_creation: None — only read-only GETs and one idempotent PUT of /api/admin/page-content/weddings (re-saves current value unchanged).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After SendFlow.js fix lands, retest by opening /product/{id} → click [data-testid='send-flow-trigger'] → confirm zero 'Maximum update depth exceeded' errors in console and that all 6 steps (card/message/date/box/addons/review) can be advanced through. Also retest admin login redirect → confirm post-login URL is /admin. Backend regression suite /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_12.py runs in ~2s and should remain at 24/24. Note: admin Service Pages modals do NOT use role='dialog' — use the data-testid editors (faith-traditions-editor, tf-letters-editor) to detect them instead.
rca of the issue: SendFlow infinite loop RCA: file /app/frontend/src/components/SendFlow.js line 80-93. The useEffect has dependency array [open, product]. When `open===true` it calls trackEvent(...). If ProductDetailPage re-renders for any reason (cart context update, image preload, etc.) and passes a new product *object reference* (i.e. `<SendFlow product={product} ... />` where `product` was reconstructed), React sees a new dep and re-runs the effect. trackEvent itself doesn't cause a state change, but the per-step render inside the modal body may set state during render (e.g. the dates list `setDelivery(dR.data)` interactions, or addons useMemo recomputation chained with a child setState). The loop fires ~50+ times per second. Reproduction: 1) load /collection 2) click any product card 3) click 'SEND THIS BOUQUET' 4) DevTools console shows 'Maximum update depth exceeded' spamming. Mitigation: useMemo the product prop in ProductDetailPage; split the reset effect (deps: [open]) from the analytics effect (deps: [open, product?.id]); audit step subcomponents for setState-in-render.
